description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy Doxygen that triggers on push to the develop branch. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-20.04 environment and skip if the commit message contains 'doc skip'. It checks out the repository with LFS support, updates dependencies, configures Feelpp with Doxygen enabled, builds Doxygen documentation, and deploys it to the gh-pages branch using the github-pages-deploy-action.
